section.about.title: About
section.about.lead: I build tools, ship them, and sometimes run them on full autopilot. The work crosses genres, but it's almost always about assembling a small "device" that does one thing well.

about.title: About
about.intro: sasoriken is an indie maker working across 3D, automation, writing tools, and design-stage experiments.
about.site_concept: This portfolio is centered on the work, not on the person. Visitors are meant to see the tools first and the author second. The site is bilingual, hosted on GitHub Pages, and written in plain vanilla JS so it can stay easy to maintain for a long time.
about.contact_desc: For questions, purchases, or following along. Platform handles may differ from the display name shown here.
